## Interaction Log

### System — 2026-06-23T11:59:12.513371

[Compressed Memory Summary]
The following is a compressed summary of earlier conversation turns, replacing the raw transcript to stay within the context window.

Task: Perform quantitative diligence on the perpetual futures instrument **H‑USDT**.  
Required data sources (call these functions):
- `blofin_technical_analysis` (RSI, EMA, ATR, Bollinger, support/resistance, long/short scores)
- `blofin_get_candles` (OHLCV candles)
- `blofin_get_funding_rate` (current funding rate + crowding bias)
- `blofin_get_order_book` (order‑book snapshot & bid/ask imbalance)

Produce a single JSON object containing:
- `instId` (instrument identifier, e.g., "H‑USDT")
- `probability_score` (overall win‑probability estimate)
- `technical_score` (aggregate technical indicator score)
- `suggested_side` ("buy" or "sell")
- `suggested_tp_pct` (target‑profit percentage)
- `suggested_sl_pct` (stop‑loss percentage)
- `key_levels` (array of important price levels: support, resistance, pivot, etc.)
- `confidence` (high/medium/low)
- `veto` (true if market is choppy or risk‑reward < 4:1, otherwise false)

The analysis must be validated; the trade will not be executed without this JSON.

auto-set to 2.5% TP / 1.5% SL from entry if omitted on new entries\n    ', 'parameters': {'type': 'object', 'properties': {'inst_id': {'type': 'string', 'description': 'inst_id'}, 'side': {'type': 'string', 'description': 'side'}, 'order_type': {'type': 'string', 'description': 'order_type'}, 'size': {'type': 'string', 'description': 'size'}, 'price': {'type': 'string', 'default': '', 'description': 'price'}, 'margin_mode': {'type': 'string', 'default': '', 'description': 'margin_mode'}, 'position_side': {'type': 'string', 'default': 'net', 'description': 'position_side'}, 'reduce_only': {'type': 'string', 'default': 'false', 'description': 'reduce_only'}, 'tp_trigger_price': {'type': 'string', 'default': '', 'description': 'tp_trigger_price'}, 'sl_trigger_price': {'type': 'string', 'default': '', 'description': 'sl_trigger_price'}, '_kwargs': {'description': '_kwargs'}}, 'required': ['inst_id', 'side', 'order_type', 'size', '_kwargs']}}}, {'type': 'function', 'function': {'name': 'blofin_place_tpsl', 'description': '\n    Attach TP/SL to an open position. side is the closing side (sell for long, buy for short).\n    size -1 = entire position. auto-set to 2.5% TP / 1.5% SL from entry if omitted on new entries\n    ', 'parameters': {'type': 'object', 'properties': {'inst_id': {'type': 'string', 'description': 'inst_id'}, 'side': {'type': 'string', 'description': 'side'}, 'order_type': {'type': 'string', 'description': 'order_type'}, 'size': {'type': 'string', 'description': 'size'}, 'price': {'type': 'string', 'default': '', 'description': 'price'}, 'margin_mode': {'type': 'string', 'default': '', 'description': 'margin_mode'}, 'position_side': {'type': 'string', 'default': 'net', 'description': 'position_side'}, 'reduce_only': {'type': 'string', 'default': 'false', 'description': 'reduce_only'}, 'tp_trigger_price': {'type': 'string', 'default': '', 'description': 'tp_trigger_price'}, 'sl_trigger_price': {'type': 'string', 'default': '', 'description': 'sl_trigger_price'}, '_kwargs': {'description': '_kwargs'}}, 'required': ['inst_id', 'side', 'order_type', 'size', '_kwargs']}}}, {'type': 'function', 'function': {'name': 'blofin_place_tpsl', 'description': '\n    Attach TP/SL to an open position. side is the closing side (sell for long, buy for short).\n    size -1 = entire position. auto-set to 2.5% TP / 1.5% SL from entry if omitted on new entries\n    ', 'parameters': {'type': 'object', 'properties': {'inst_id': {'type': 'string', 'description': 'inst_id'}, 'side': {'type': 'string', 'description': 'side'}, 'order_type': {'type': 'string', 'description': 'order_type'}, 'size': {'type': 'string', 'description': 'size'}, 'price': {'type': 'string', 'default': '', 'description': 'price'}, 'margin_mode': {'type': 'string', 'default': '', 'description': 'margin_mode'}, 'position_side': {'type': 'string', 'default': 'net', 'description': 'position_side'}, 'reduce_only': {'type': 'string', 'default': 'false', 'description': 'reduce_only'}, 'tp_trigger_price': {'type': 'string', 'default': '', 'description': 'tp_trigger_price'}, 'sl_trigger_price': {'type': 'string', 'default': '', 'description': 'sl_trigger_price'}, '_kwargs': {'description': '_kwargs'}}, 'required': ['inst_id', 'side', 'order_type', 'size', '_kwargs']}}}, {'type': 'function', 'function': {'name': 'blofin_place_tpsl', 'description': '\n    Attach TP/SL to an open position. side is the closing side (sell for long, buy for short).\n    size -1 = entire position. auto-set to 2.5% TP / 1.5% SL from entry if omitted on new entries\n    ', 'parameters': {'type': 'object', 'properties': {'inst_id': {'type': 'string', 'description': 'inst_id'}, 'side': {'type': 'string', 'description': 'side'}, 'order_type': {'type': 'string', 'description': 'order_type'}, 'size': {'type': 'string', 'description': 'size'}, 'price': {'type': 'string', 'default': '', 'description': 'price'}, 'margin_mode': {'type': 'string', 'default': '', 'description': 'margin_mode'}, 'position_side': {'type': 'string', 'default': 'net', 'description': 'position_side'}, 'reduce_only': {'type': 'string', 'default': 'false', 'description': 'reduce_only'}, 'tp_trigger_price': {'type': 'string', 'default': '', 'description': 'tp_trigger_price'}, 'sl_trigger_price': {'type': 'string', 'default': '', 'description': 'sl_trigger_price'}, '_kwargs': {'description': '_kwargs'}}, 'required': ['inst_id', 'side', 'order_type', 'size', '_kwargs']}}}, {'type': 'function', 'function': {'name': 'blofin_place_tpsl', 'description': '\n    Attach TP/SL to an open position. side is the closing side (sell for long, buy for short).\n    size -1 = entire position. auto-set to 2.5% TP / 1.5% SL from entry if omitted on new entries\n    ', 'parameters': {'type': 'object', 'properties': {'inst_id': {'type': 'string', 'description': 'inst_id'}, 'side': {'type': 'string', 'description': 'side'}, 'order_type': {'type': 'string', 'description': 'order_type'}, 'size': {'type': 'string', 'description': 'size'}, 'price': {'type': 'string', 'default': '', 'description': 'price'}, 'margin_mode': {'type': 'string', 'default': '', 'description': 'margin_mode'}, 'position_side': {'type': 'string', 'default': 'net', 'description': 'position_side'}, 'reduce_only': {'type': 'string', 'default': 'false', 'description': 'reduce_only'}, 'tp_trigger_price': {'type': 'string', 'default': '', 'description': 'tp_trigger_price'}, 'sl_trigger_price': {'type': 'string', 'default': '', 'description': 'sl_trigger_price'}, '_kwargs': {'description': '_kwargs'}}, 'required': ['inst_id', 'side', 'order_type', 'size', '_kwargs']}}}, {'type': 'function', 'function': {'name': 'blofin_place_tpsl', 'description': '\n    Attach TP/SL to an open position. side is the closing side (sell for long, buy for short).\n    size -1 = entire position.
